context: Tests whether swiftui-performance stays focused and routes adjacent SwiftUI, telemetry, and navigation requests to sibling skills.

checklist.name: Performance ownership
checklist.description: Keeps profiling, update fan-out, body cost, identity churn, lazy container behavior, image work, and representable update cost in swiftui-performance scope.

checklist.name: Animation handoff
checklist.description: Routes transition curves, timing, SymbolEffect, and animation API details to swiftui-animation when those are the primary issue.

checklist.name: Navigation handoff
checklist.description: Routes NavigationStack routing, modal routing, and deep-link behavior to swiftui-navigation.

checklist.name: MetricKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes MXDiagnosticPayload ingestion, subscribers, and production hang telemetry pipelines to metrickit while keeping Instruments capture in scope.

checklist.name: Layout and architecture boundaries
checklist.description: Routes general layout/container construction to swiftui-layout-components and broad state/composition architecture to swiftui-patterns unless directly tied to measured performance.

checklist.name: No sibling implementations
checklist.description: Does not provide full MetricKit, NavigationStack, or animation implementations while claiming to preserve boundaries.
